over_strict.description: OVER strict test, confidence >= 90, quality >= 86, edge >= 0.10, expected_margin >= 2.2, line <= 21.5

diagnostics.comment: If UNDER ROI is much higher, model should be treated as under-first instead of symmetric totals model.
Check whether higher confidence buckets actually improve WR/ROI.
If high quality is not better than mid quality, quality_score is not well calibrated.
If edge does not rank well, edge may mostly represent higher odds rather than true probability advantage.
Expected margin should ideally be one of the strongest signals.
